name: Research Kuaishou video details from a keyword with JustOneAPI - real response adjusted

parameters.content:
## Research Kuaishou video details from a keyword with JustOneAPI - real response adjusted

### How it works

1. Trigger workflow manually to begin research process
2. Prepare API parameters and user inputs for search
3. Search Kuaishou videos using keyword input
4. Extract video IDs from search results
5. Check if valid video IDs exist
6. Fetch detailed information for each valid video
7. Compile video details into structured output

### Setup steps

- - [ ] Configure JustOneAPI credentials in n8n credentials store
- - [ ] Set base URL for Kuaishou API endpoints
- - [ ] Define required fields for video search and details retrieval

### Customization

The workflow can be customized by:
- Adding more search filters in the 'Prepare API and Research Inputs' node
- Modifying the output fields in 'Build Video Detail List' node
- Adjusting error handling in the conditional branch

## Workflow Trigger

Manual initiation point for the research workflow

## Input Preparation

Sets up API parameters and user inputs for search

## Video Search Execution

Performs API call to search Kuaishou videos by keyword

## Search Results Processing

Extracts video IDs from search results and checks validity

## Video Details Retrieval

Fetches detailed information for each valid video ID

## Results Compilation

Builds final structured output of video details

## Search Results Output

Outputs raw search results for reference
